Code Documentation¶

The following pages are generated directly from the Django codebase using sphinx.ext.autodoc and the docstrings added to models, forms, views, serializers, permissions, signals, and project configuration modules.

  • newsapp package
    • newsapp.apps module
    • newsapp.admin module
    • newsapp.forms module
    • newsapp.models module
    • newsapp.permissions module
    • newsapp.serializers module
    • newsapp.signals module
    • newsapp.urls module
    • newsapp.views module
  • project package
    • manage module
    • news_portal.settings module
    • news_portal.urls module
    • news_portal.asgi module
    • news_portal.wsgi module
